title: La sirena negra
writer: Juan Antonio Cabezas, Pedro Lazaga, Emilia Pardo Bazán
actors: Fernando Fernán Gómez, Isabel de Pomés, José María Lado
plot: Gaspar is a saturnine, lackluster bachelor who falls in love with Rita, a moribund phthisic woman. When she passes away, Gaspar adopts her previous out-of-wedlock daughter, thus regaining faith in life. With the purpose of raising...
